displayNameZh: AI 技能节点网路连线动画
summary: Yt Ai Skill Network component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「AI 技能节点网路连线动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-ai-skill-network/src/YtAiSkillNetwork.tsx` and `remotion/yt-ai-skill-network/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtAiSkillNetwork` and `ytAiSkillNetworkDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Ai Skill Network Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-ai-skill-network to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtAiSkillNetworkProps API and register the YtAiSkillNetwork composition with the default props.
